name: tinker-experiments
notes: Prompt distillation research: fine-tunes a small student model (Qwen3-4B via Tinker API LoRA) to internalize a 591-token system prompt, eliminating it at inference time. 85.5% token reduction per query (691→100 tokens), 98.3% cost drop vs teacher model. Mechanism is model weight baking, not runtime hook/compaction — requires fine-tuning infra and is specific to one fixed persona/system-prompt. NOT cache-safe in any Claude Code sense; operates at model training level, not at API/hook level. No hook, no compactor, no CLI integration. Target: any LLM inference workload with a large fixed system prompt (not Claude Code specifically). One-off research experiment, not a deployed tool.
